docs.overview:
# Divider

The Divider component is used to visually separate content with a horizontal or vertical line.
docs.api: # API ## [z-divider] Component > `z-divider` is used to visually separate content with a horizontal or vertical line. | Property | Description | Type | Default | | -------------- | ----------------------------- | ---------------------------- | ------------ | | `zOrientation` | Defines the divider direction | `"horizontal" \| "vertical"` | `horizontal` |
